summary: Frontend-only testing of LaunchPath design overhaul. All major features verified: FourPillars removed, 3 static stats in metric band, alternating dark/light backgrounds, TCO calculator functional.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid is 'tco-calculator-section' not 'tco-section' — minor naming inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: TCO section testid is 'tco-calculator-section' — not a bug, just noting for test consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: All design consolidation changes verified working. FourPillars absent, metric band shows 49/96.4%/10+ with philosophical line, Hero bg=#1B2A4A dark, DeadlySins/TCO/Founder all bg=#F5F5F5 light. TCO calculator computes results. Knowledge and About pages route correctly.

test_results.tco_calculator_functional: PASS - inputs accepted, Calculate button works, results displayed
